mapper.update: update yy_booking_slot_inventory set paid_count = coalesce(paid_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now(), version = coalesce(version, 0) + 1 where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0' and status = 'ACTIVE' and coalesce(paid_count, 0) < coalesce(capacity, 0)

update yy_booking_slot_inventory set paid_count = greatest(coalesce(paid_count, 0) - 1, 0), update_time = now(), version = coalesce(version, 0) + 1 where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0' and coalesce(paid_count, 0) > 0
update yy_booking_slot_inventory set conflict_count = coalesce(conflict_count, 0) + 1, update_time = now(), version = coalesce(version, 0) + 1 where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
